basicDetails.implementingAgency: Secondary Education Department, Government Of Uttarakhand

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Rani Laxmi Bai Self-Defense Training” is a scheme under the Samagra Shiksha Programme, implemented by the Secondary Education Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide free self-defense skills training (including judo, karate, martial arts, and boxing) to girl students in upper primary and secondary schools across the state.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Free self-defense techniques training is provided to girl students.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide free self-defense skills training (including judo, karate, martial arts, and boxing) to girl students in upper primary and secondary schools across Uttarakhand.

children.text: The “Rani Laxmi Bai Self-Defense Training” is a scheme under the Samagra Shiksha Programme, implemented by the Secondary Education Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide free self-defense skills training (including judo, karate, martial arts, and boxing) to girl students in upper primary and secondary schools across the state.
Free self-defense techniques training is provided to girl students.

Self-defense skills training (judo, karate, martial arts, and boxing) is provided to female students in upper primary and secondary schools across the state. All girls in each selected school are included in the training.

applicationProcess.process_md: Self-defense skills training (judo, karate, martial arts, and boxing) is provided to female students in upper primary and secondary schools across the state. All girls in each selected school are included in the training.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant (girl student) must be studying in an upper primary or secondary government school in Uttarakhand.

children.text: The applicant (girl student) must be studying in an upper primary or secondary government school in Uttarakhand.
